name: I'm a lawyer in New York and Google AI Overview cited fake cases about my firm - what do I do?
description: Demand correction; Section 230 protects Google but document for potential defamation claim.

mainEntity.name: I'm a lawyer in New York and Google AI Overview cited fake cases about my firm - what do I do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Demand correction; Section 230 protects Google but document for potential defamation claim.
acceptedAnswer.description: Demand a correction from Google and monitor for recurrence, but legal claims face high hurdles under Section 230.[2][3] The NY Mata case fined a lawyer for AI fake citations, highlighting risks, but Google as platform is protected. Key factors: Evidence of defamation per se; actual malice proof; immunity exceptions rare. Preserve screenshots, send cease-and-desist if severe, file complaint with Google support first. Consult a NY defamation attorney promptly.
